calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-09-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on defendant Laurell Hampton's Motion to Vacate the Judgment issued February 17, 2009.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

John P. Zhanghi, Esq. appeared for plaintiff John Stewart Company.
John G. Carella, Esq. appeared with defendant and moving party Laurell Hampton, who was placed under oath but did not testify.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court GRANTS defendant and moving party Laurell Hampton's motion. The Judgment issued February 17, 2009 is VACATED, and the Writ of Possession issued February 19, 2009 is RECALLED. The Court's Order is conditioned on defendant Laurell Hampton paying the John Stewart Company $380.00 by March 16, 2009, and $180.00 no later than April 2, 2009. No attorney's fees are ordered at this time.

Order After Hearing was submitted to and signed by the Court.

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-17-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

John P. Zhanghi, Esq. appeared for plaintiff John Stewart Company.
Ike Okwuosa, Property Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Laurell Hampton.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on February 2, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff John Stewart Company, and against defendant Laurell Hampton as follows:

Holdover Damages - $1,101.94.
Costs - $425.00.
Total - $1,526.94.

Additionally, plaintiff John Stewart Company is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 387 Ellis Street, #511, San Francisco, CA 94102. The lease agreement is forfeited.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-17-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John P. Zanghi, Esq., appeared for and with plaintiff.
Defendant did not appear.

Settlement conference off calendar. Defendant did not appear. Trial remains on calendar.

Hon William R. Gargano, Clerk Garth Sayers, Not reported. (218)
